external.title: Open Packages are Overpowered, Wed, May 13, 2026, 6:00 PM   | Meetup

record.text:
Open Packages are Overpowered

Drop by the Pacific PowerShell User Group tomorrow night to learn more about how Open Packages work, what they do, and how they open new possibilities for us all.

Party starts at 6pm pacific time
